_correction.reason: Owner clarified Spaarke uses sprk_communication (with sprk_communicationtype discriminator) for emails. Original repo file used OOB email activity entity incorrectly. Corrected per CLAUDE.md § '2026-06-25 — Spaarke entity architecture'.
_correction.alsoAdded: Membership-scope branch via LookupUserMembership (ActionType 52) preserved — deployed PB-016 currently LACKS this, R4 PR 3 W1 + AC-5b deploys the corrected union.

playbook.name: New Emails on Matters
playbook.description: Notifies users when new emails (sprk_communication records with sprk_communicationtype = Email/100000000) have been received on their assigned matters since the last check. Resolves matter memberships via the LookupUserMembership node (ADR-034 / R3 FR-1C.2 / A1 defect remediation) and filters inbound communications by those matter IDs within the configurable timeWindow parameter. Uses Spaarke custom sprk_communication entity (NOT OOB email activity).

timeWindow.label: Time window
timeWindow.description: How far back to look for new emails

configJson.description: Scoped to the current user's assigned matters (resolved via LookupUserMembership node)

Resolve the executing user's matter memberships (owner + assigned attorney + assigned paralegal) per ADR-034. Resolved IDs are bound to `myMatters.ids` for downstream filtering via {{joinIds myMatters.ids}}.

configJson.fetchXml: <fetch top="50"><entity name="sprk_communication"><attribute name="sprk_subject"/><attribute name="sprk_from"/><attribute name="sprk_to"/><attribute name="sprk_receiveddate"/><attribute name="createdon"/><attribute name="sprk_communicationid"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordname"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordurl"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingmatter"/><attribute name="ownerid"/><link-entity name="sprk_matter" from="sprk_matterid" to="sprk_regardingmatter" link-type="outer" alias="m"><attribute name="sprk_mattername"/><attribute name="sprk_matternumber"/><attribute name="ownerid"/></link-entity><filter type="and"><condition attribute="sprk_communicationtype" operator="eq" value="100000000"/><condition attribute="createdon" operator="last-x-hours" value="{{timeWindowHours}}"/><condition attribute="createdby" operator="ne-userid"/><filter type="or"><condition attribute="sprk_regardingmatter" operator="in" value="{{joinIds myMatters.ids}}"/><condition entityname="m" attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/><condition attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/></filter></filter><order attribute="sprk_receiveddate" descending="true"/><order attribute="createdon" descending="true"/></entity></fetch>
configJson.description: New sprk_communication records (type=Email 100000000, createdby != current user, createdon in last {{timeWindowHours}}, default 24h) where EITHER (a) sprk_regardingmatter is in the user's myMatters.ids membership set [LookupUserMembership branch], OR (b) the email owner is the current user, OR (c) the sprk_regardingmatter owner is the current user. Sort: sprk_receiveddate desc, createdon desc tiebreaker.
Check if any new emails were found

configJson.title: You have {{newEmails.output.count}} new email(s) on your matters
